title: Career Opportunity Medical Officer at Wockhardt Hospitals

jsonLd.title: Career Opportunity Medical Officer at Wockhardt Hospitals
jsonLd.description:
Wockhardt Hospitals has an exciting opening for a Medical Officer at our Mysuru office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Wockhardt Hospitals:
Wockhardt Hospitals is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor patient progress and adjust treatment plans accordingly
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits
• Respond to medical emergencies and provide immediate care
• Ensure patient privacy and maintain confidentiality
• Attend continuing medical education programs and training
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in HIPAA Compliance
• Proficiency in ICU Management
• Proficiency in BLS/ACLS
• Proficiency in ICD-10
• Proficiency in Medical Ethics
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in Surgical Procedures
• Proficiency in EMR/EHR

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Flexible working hours
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Mysuru, Karnataka, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Wockhardt Hospitals!
